title: F1 Ferrari Progression Infographic

imagePrompts.prompt: Infographic which shows the progression of F1 Ferrari cars from old to latest new 2026 Ferrari Formula 1 car, the SF-26 (codenamed Project 678), which was officially revealed on January 23, 2026.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Infographic which shows the progression of F1 Ferrari cars from old to latest new 2026 Ferrari Formula 1 car, the SF-26 (codenamed Project 678), which was officially revealed on January 23, 2026.

Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

promptTranslations.zh: 一张信息图，展示了从老款到最新的2026款法拉利一级方程式赛车（即代号为Project 678的SF-26）的演变历程，该车于2026年1月23日正式发布。
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

Infographic which shows the progression of F1 Ferrari cars from old to latest new 2026 Ferrari Formula 1 car, the SF-26 (codenamed Project 678), which was officially revealed on January 23, 2026.
promptTranslations.ru: Инфографика, демонстрирующая эволюцию болидов Ferrari в Формуле-1 от исторических моделей до новейшего болида Ferrari 2026 года — SF-26 (кодовое название Project 678), официально представленного 23 января 2026 года.

Use o prompt em inglês abaixo para gerar a imagem; mantenha textos visíveis, nomes de marca, valores de variáveis e parâmetros em inglês.

Infographic which shows the progression of F1 Ferrari cars from old to latest new 2026 Ferrari Formula 1 car, the SF-26 (codenamed Project 678), which was officially revealed on January 23, 2026.
promptTranslations.ja: 歴代のF1フェラーリから、2026年1月23日に公式発表された最新の2026年型F1マシン「SF-26」（プロジェクトコード：Project 678）に至るまでの進化の過程を示すインフォグラフィック。
promptTranslations.ko: 과거부터 최신 2026년형 페라리 포뮬러 1 차량인 SF-26(프로젝트명 678, 2026년 1월 23일 공식 공개)까지의 진화 과정을 보여주는 인포그래픽
